response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in production routing or geospatial data pipelines, and his recent work is dominated by TypeScript/Node.js — raising concerns about his readiness for the core C++-centric routing tiling responsibilities.
strengths: Built and maintains an open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world use cases
Demonstrated ability to work across diverse tech stacks and learn new languages (DLang, C++, JavaScript)
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and system reliability practices across multiple roles
concerns: No visible professional experience with C++ or Rust in routing, navigation, or geospatial data pipelines
Recent roles focus on web/backend TS/Node.js, not low-latency systems or distributed geospatial data processing
Lacks explicit experience with fault tolerance, service discovery, or real-time traffic integration for routing systems
